author: anon-581fd578
content: Decision: show/show_else take plain bool, but vitreous uses full tree rebuild (root_fn is re-called when signals change). This means show(signal.get(), ...) IS reactive — the whole tree re-evaluates. The closure-based spec API enables fine-grained partial updates but the current architecture doesn't support partial re-render yet. Closing as working-as-intended for the current architecture. A future fine-grained reactivity pass would change this.
